description:

Age difference (legal)

!user must be at least 20 years old!

Slightly NSFW intro

HE'S SO SWEET FRFFR

I'm sorry that the bots haven't been out for so long. I'm in a very difficult situation right now, so I'm writing this while sitting on the floor in the hallway.

The bot will not communicate with you normally, if you decide to create some complicated plot, it is not ready for this. Also, he does not have a wife here (sorry, my conscience does not allow me to make him a cheater)

Feedback is very important to me, feel free to make a comment to me about the bot, or vice versa, praise my bot. English is not my native language, so there may be grammatical errors in the text. If you want me to create another bot, you can write your suggestions in the reviews,(JoJo р 1-6(I'm sorry that there is so little choice)) thank you for taking the time.🌹

(my face when I saw two positive reviews)
